name: 锯齿爪刀（★） | 人工染色
nameZh: 锯齿爪刀（★） | 人工染色
descriptionEn: This ivory-handled karambit features brass rivets and saw-tooth ridges, so it cuts on the way in, and tears on the way out. It has been given a forced patina using lemon and mustard dripped onto the surface. If you think it's messy now, wait until you see it under a blacklight
descriptionZh: 这把象牙把手的爪子刀搭配了铜钉和锯齿刀背，以达到进刀切割、出刀撕裂的效果。 通过将柠檬汁和芥末滴到这把武器的表面，它被人工地附上了氧化层。 你也许以为刀刃上一团糟，请在黑光灯源下瞧瞧吧
